race.comment: KING OF THE SEA (11) imported gelding who loomed strongly second-up with a slashing third over 2100m at Gosford. Will appreciate the Randwick surface and big weight drop. Can race a touch closer and take holding out. STARZINTHEIREYES (7) lightly raced UK gelding who made his Australian debut with an eye catching second over 1800m at Hawkesbury with the 61kg. Group 3 winner in 2024 and looks well placed with the 57kg. Each way. PINHOLE (12) jumped in trip at his second Australian start with a respectable ninth over 2100m at Gosford. Key jockey change and shapes as a top-three contender with the 54.5kg. Value chance. BRAVE CALL (9) second-up and returns from a let-up. Ready for this trip and further now and loves rain affected going. Since fitted with a 1200m trial placing. Goes into the exotics. TAZIMA (10) deep into the prep and not to be overlooked with Grima's 3kg claim. Adept in all conditions and kept ticking over with a 1045m trial. Stays in the mix.
